method: Hybrid v26 feasibility test for an early fast-failure abort exit. The branch exits only if a trade still shows too little best-so-far progress after a minimum age and is already underwater by a configured ORB-multiple loss.

structural_conclusion.qc_observation: Accepted v26 trades still contain a meaningful cluster of quick losers that never make much early progress before absorbing large adverse moves.
structural_conclusion.research_interpretation: That makes fast-failure aborts a materially different branch from the already-tested late-session washout exits.
structural_conclusion.next_step_rule: Do not launch a QC candidate unless this branch improves local full-sample PnL and at least 2/4 walk-forward folds.
